name: Susie
description:
"Let me tell you a secret... Quiet people piss me off."

💜

Hello!

This bot was requested to me quite a while ago, but unfortunately she went through several revisions because of some weird responses I kept consistently getting from her. Now, though, she should be as best as I can get her with some pretty dynamic responses, and I'm glad to finally release her!

Admittedly, she has a ton more tokens than I originally intended primarily because I wanted to make sure she had some context on the Dark Worlds (as in this version Chapter 1 has already happened, despite the scenario being practically identical to the start of Chapter 1) and so she has a bunch of info about that! I'd still just recommend you stuck to Light World scenarios, but the option is there for you.

Either way, I hope you enjoy her! I'm still taking requests and will probably try making more Deltarune bots, so feel free to comment or leave a review with some ideas (or even criticisms) for my bots. Susie is also obviously 18+ in this scenario; otherwise I wouldn't have made her.

Also, VERY, VERY, VERY long message warning, tested primarily with Deepseek v3! Take care. 💜

AI Image generated by: ("ambrose" on rule34)

The image was slightly edited by me to appear more accurate to Susie's colour palette and to remove the background.
